_meta.title: Bambu Lab — gcode_state → normalized lifecycle

derived_from.source_note: Clean-room from OpenBambuAPI (GFDL-1.3 docs) + scarlton/open-bambu-networking (MIT) + owner hardware captures. No code copied; no access code / serial / cert reproduced.

notes: `gcode_state` may arrive at the top level or nested under `print`; P-series sends only changed keys, X-series the full object — deep-merge, never replace.
Normalized vocabulary here: standby | printing | paused | complete | error.

gotchas.text: An aborted print returns to gcode_state=IDLE, so a *failed* job is indistinguishable from plain standby on this field alone. Surface the fault channels (`hms[]` array of {attr,code} and the 32-bit `print_error`) to tell a real failure from an idle machine.
